info.title: Kalos Fitness API
info.description:
API for the Kalos fitness application - a progressive calisthenics training tracker.

## Authentication
All endpoints require Bearer token authentication via better-auth.

## Core Concepts
- **Exercise Categories**: Groups of exercises (push-ups, pull-ups, squats, etc.)
- **Exercises**: Individual exercises with progression levels within categories
- **Programs**: User training plans with scheduled training days
- **Workout Sessions**: Actual workout instances with tracked sets and reps

get.description: Returns a paginated list of users. Admin only.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, username, or email

get.description: Get current user's progression for all categories

post.description: Start tracking a new exercise category
Create a new planned or immediate workout session

patch.description: Update session status, complete session, etc.

post.description: Transition session from planned to in_progress
Mark session as completed and calculate totals

patch.description: Record actual value, mark as completed/skipped
